overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The journey transitions from a wide sunlit arterial avenue with towering skyscrapers into a narrower covered roadway lined with green sound barriers and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide futuristic urban arterial with elevated transit

events.description: navigating through moderate traffic with vehicles changing lanes and merging
turning right onto narrower road with green barrier wall

agents.ego_description: driving straight through busy futuristic city center, maintaining speed with traffic flow

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving parallel in the left lane, maintaining steady speed
oncoming traffic approaching in opposite lanes across the median

entered.detail: red-painted elevated monorail or highway structure running parallel to the street with support columns
gigantic brutalist megastructure with a large central archway tunnel piercing through its center
tall futuristic glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows and geometric facade patterns
large holographic advertisement display showing NEW OFFER text with product imagery

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wide sunlit avenue in a futuristic metropolis, surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture including a distinctive massive building with a central archway. The road features moderate traffic density with various vehicles navigating the multi-lane highway, while elevated transit infrastructure and digital billboards line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban roadway with green sound barriers and stacked overpasses

events.description: entering narrower covered roadway with prominent green sound barrier wall on right side
passing under elevated highway into deeper shadow with artificial neon illumination becoming dominant
road surface transitions from red painted section to blue painted section indicating lane changes

agents.ego_description: navigating along the green barrier wall at reduced speed, passing under multiple levels of highway infrastructure

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car overtaking on the left side before pulling ahead

entered.detail: corrugated green metal noise reduction barrier running continuously alongside the road
large illuminated overhead advertisement for EL GUAPO with bright red and cyan graphics
multi-level concrete highway structure crossing overhead with massive support pillars
building exterior covered in glowing digital screens displaying various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right onto a narrower road defined by a prominent green sound barrier wall, entering a more enclosed urban canyon beneath stacked highway overpasses. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadows and bright neon holographic advertisements, while the road features distinctive colored lane markings as traffic thins out in this covered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic metropolis that gradually transitions into a shadowed, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by driving along a wide arterial avenue surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture and a massive building with a central archway, moving through moderate traffic beneath elevated transit lines. As the vehicle turns right, the open skyline vanishes and the scene shifts into a narrower roadway defined by a prominent green sound barrier wall. The environment then becomes an enclosed urban canyon beneath stacked highway overpasses, where the bright daylight gives way to a mix of deep shadows and glowing holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera glides along distinctive colored lane markings as the traffic thins out within this covered corridor.
